headline: Coterra Energy (CTRA) to Report Q1 Results: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Cabot (CTRA) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
